title: TURMERIFIC TREATS - Delicious Dog Treats with Turmeric for Hip & Joint Health - "Paw Lickin' Crispy Chicken" Flavour that your dog will LOVE!
features: Tasty Treats to Maintain Healthy Joints
Healthy Treats that Dogs Love to Eat
description: Product description Vet’s Advantage “Turmerific Treats” are a tasty and fun way for your dog to get the numerous benefits of all-natural Turmeric. "Turmerific Treats" contain high levels of the "healthy joint" nutrient Curcumin , the key ingredient in Turmeric. “Turmerific Treats” will help your dog maintain healthy joints, optimal mobility and a shiny coat. Your dog will absolutely ♥ LOVE ♥ the delicious “Paw-Lickin’ Crispy Chicken” flavour...made with real chicken!! Vet’s Advantage "Turmerific Treats" are Doggone Delicious and Mighty Nutritious!!! Indications hip and joint health, immunity, inflammation, skin and coat health Directions Administer to dog as a treat See more
